flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Maryland Global Campus fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Maryland Global Campus rose 83% between 2021 and 2024 (5.4% → 9.8%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at University of Maryland Global Campus rose 56% between 2021 and 2024 (21.4% → 33.3%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Maryland Global Campus rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 (43.0k → 49.7k).
